name: Anthropic Provider
tagline: Use your Anthropic account to power BFrost with Claude — no local GPU required.
description:
Built-in cloud LLM provider that routes all model calls to Anthropic's API using your API key. Supports the full Claude model family for chat, reasoning, and tool use.

This is a core infrastructure worker — it ships with every BFrost installation and cannot be removed.
author: @bfrost

versions.changelog: Ships with BFrost. No standalone install needed.
